text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Running beside the water feels great.
There's a cool breeze and a lovely smell in the
air... Wait!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! This is an emergency! I see a kebab stand
over there!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Urk! It smells so delicious... What should I do?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ughhh... Oooh... Okay, fine. Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run and run until the aroma fades from
my memory!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure fate will bring us together again
someday!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fighting through sweat and tears, Oguri Cap
remains focused on her running. In the end, she
manages to get back to her target weight.
